texto: I think that Gnosticism is about discovering the way that God has turned into you, and then realizing that if you can describe how it is that God turned into you, you can reverse the process.
explicacao: Citação de Stevan L. Davies sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I think that Gnosticism is about discovering the way that God has turned into you, and then reali…” articula reflexao, religion, turned em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
